title: Port Equipment Structural Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: Saudi heavy fabricators upgraded to port equipment standards through Mawani and PSAP Track 3
executive_summary:
Port equipment — ship-to-shore cranes, rubber-tyred gantry cranes, reach stackers, spreader frames, fenders, bollards, and mooring hardware — is manufactured using heavy structural steel fabrication, precision machining, and electrical systems integration. Saudi Arabia's port expansion programme (King Abdulaziz Port Dammam, Jeddah Islamic Port, King Salman Port at Ras Al-Khair) represents billions of dollars of port equipment investment — all currently procured from Chinese, South Korean, and European manufacturers.

Node MR-3 targets the most accessible manufacturing entry point in the port equipment value chain: structural and mechanical components that can be manufactured using Saudi heavy fabrication capability. Crane booms, fender frames, bollard assemblies, and gantry structures are large-format steel fabrications that Saudi companies like Zamil Industrial and Al-Babtain already produce for industrial and infrastructure applications.

The global port equipment market was valued at $4.8 billion in 2024 growing at 5.1% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's port expansion programme creates $800M–1.2B in port equipment procurement over the next decade. Even 20% Saudi content capture represents $160–240 million in manufacturing value retained in-Kingdom.

companies.name: Liebherr Maritime Cranes
companies.rationale: Liebherr manufactures port cranes and has established local manufacturing partnerships globally. Non-ITAR German technology with active Gulf port relationships.

companies.name: Konecranes
companies.rationale: Konecranes produces port cranes and has international manufacturing partnerships. Active Saudi Arabia port equipment market.

companies.name: ZPMC (China)
companies.rationale: ZPMC is the world's largest ship-to-shore crane manufacturer with active Saudi Arabia port contracts. Sub-assembly manufacturing partnership.

companies.name: Trelleborg Marine Systems
companies.rationale: Trelleborg produces marine fenders and mooring equipment. Saudi manufacturing of Trelleborg-designed structural components.

companies.name: Cavotec
companies.rationale: Cavotec produces port power, mooring, and automation systems with international partnerships.
companies.contact: Cavotec VP Business Development, Middle East

partners.name: Zamil Industrial
partners.current: Heavy steel fabrication; structural steelwork; industrial equipment
partners.upgrade: Port equipment structure fabrication; crane boom and gantry frame manufacturing; Liebherr or Konecranes approved fabricator programme; Lloyd's Register certification for port equipment
partners.timeline: 18 months to first crane structure delivery

partners.name: Saudi Ports Authority (Mawani)
partners.upgrade: Mawani local content requirement for port equipment tenders; 20% Saudi content mandate by 2027; Saudi supplier development programme for port equipment

partners.name: SABIC Steel / Hadeed
partners.current: Structural steel supply; heavy sections and plate
partners.upgrade: Port equipment steel specification qualification; Hadeed supply to Saudi port equipment manufacturers; steel quality standards for marine environment

partners.name: Royal Commission for Jubail
partners.upgrade: Port equipment manufacturing cluster at Jubail; shared fabrication infrastructure; Lloyd's Register certification support for Saudi manufacturers
